bug.description: CRC computation or checking error causing false positive or missed error detection

prompt:
There is a CRC computation or checking error causing false positive or missed error detection downstream of function dl_tti_pdu_type_to_str in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi/src/nr_fapi_p7_utils.c:2136.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
